activities_projects.title: Character Analysis of Mahendra
steps: Read the lesson carefully
Identify Mahendra’s qualities and behaviour
Write 5–6 sentences describing his character

activities_projects.title: Storytelling Skills of Iswaran
activities_projects.objective: Identify qualities of a good storyteller
steps: Read the parts where Iswaran tells stories
List three techniques he uses to make stories interesting
Explain them briefly

activities_projects.title: Elephant Incident Summary
activities_projects.objective: Understand the elephant story told by Iswaran
steps: Read the elephant episode carefully
Write a short summary in 5–6 sentences
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and clarity of summary (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Suspense in the Story
steps: Identify scenes that create suspense
Explain how the writer builds suspense in 4–5 sentences

activities_projects.title: Iswaran’s Influence on Mahendra
steps: Identify the ghost story told by Iswaran
Explain how it affects Mahendra’s thoughts and behaviour

activities_projects.title: Importance of Setting
activities_projects.objective: Understand the setting of the story
steps: Describe the place where Mahendra and Iswaran stay
Write 4–5 sentences explaining its importance

activities_projects.title: Sequence Chart
steps: List five important events in the lesson
Arrange them in chronological order

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Activity
steps: Choose five difficult words from the lesson
Write their meanings
Use them in sentences

activities_projects.title: Theme Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify the theme of the story
steps: Think about the main idea of the story
Write 4–5 sentences explaining the theme

activities_projects.title: Ending Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand the significance of the ending
steps: Read the final part of the story
Explain why Mahendra decides to leave the place
